title: How to build reliable software with AI agents
summary: Google Cloud discusses how to mitigate technical debt from AI coding agents through human-in-the-loop verification and rigorous testing. The speakers argue that maintaining engineering discipline and code review processes is essential to realize value from AI-accelerated development rather than just increasing output volume.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech examines how AI coding agents introduce technical debt and what practices keep agent-assisted development reliable. The speakers center human-in-the-loop verification and rigorous automated testing, arguing that established engineering discipline and code review processes must remain in place. The core claim: value from AI-accelerated development comes from maintaining those controls, not from raising output volume alone.
